label: offensive
rationale: Crude personal insults ('watch anal porns') and generic 'Goons wanavuruga' - vulgar but not ethnic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'most useless politician' - personal attack on named politician Wamalwa, ethnic-bloc preference expressed but not attack.

label: neither
rationale: 'RUTO NI ADUI WA KIPSIGIS' - intra-Kalenjin political criticism of Ruto, not group attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'get killed and tossed like garbage', 'Sons of puta' - violent crude threats at goons as individuals, not ethnic.

label: neither
rationale: 'Raila suffered at the hands of Kikuyus...unforgiving' - ethnic-bloc electoral history, no contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus following Gachagua blindly...Change now or perish later' - collective foolishness plus threat.

label: hate
rationale: 'Hii kabila yenu ni ya crybabies and emotional wrecks' - collective negative trait to tribe.

label: neither
rationale: 'luos don't realize oburu does not give 2 fucks about luos' - criticism of representation, sympathetic to Luos.

label: hate
rationale: 'mbwa nyinyi' (you dogs) directed at ethnic/regional groups - dehumanizing.

label: neither
rationale: Reporting what others said about Luos ('telling Luos they are cowards'), condemning via 'Karma'.

label: hate
rationale: 'umbwa kama wewe...izo Somali zime sneak in...deal with your kind' - dehumanizing + threat.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Lefties are just fucking violent...like the Orks' - crude political ideology attack, not protected characteristic.

label: hate
rationale: 'wajaluo wanatumika kama goons ndio wajinga wamebaki' - Luos collectively called fools and tools.

label: neither
rationale: 'Ruto MUST Rule till 2032, whether KIKUYUS LIKE IT or NOT' - provocative political statement, ethnic-bloc taunting but not contempt.

label: neither
rationale: 'Wamunyoro atatapeli hawa wote' - politician Wamunyoro will deceive, political prediction.

label: offensive
rationale: Tanzania politics: 'hawa wahuni' (these thugs) about officials, not Kenyan ethnic context.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro tribal bigots' - ethnic label used as collective attack.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kalonzo misled them...Ni mtu muchoyo' (he's greedy) - criticism of politician, sympathetic to Kambas.

label: hate
rationale: 'Those clitless bandits...No respectable man wants that' - FGM-based dehumanization of ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'Luos shall...vote for Kindiki...to punish Murima' - ethnic-bloc electoral prediction.

label: offensive
rationale: 'ww mjinga na gachietha' (you fool) - personal insult, political commentary.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyu from central hukuwa wajinga sana' (are very foolish) - collective negative trait.

label: neither
rationale: 'huyu mkalee amesema ukweli' (this Kalenjin spoke truth) - neutral/positive ethnic reference.

label: offensive
rationale: Angry caps at named politician Murkomen, personal not group-based.

label: neither
rationale: 'Rigathi Gachagua ni Mkabila' (is a tribalist) - accusation against individual politician.
